data.title: Breaking! Coinbase in Talks to Acquire Deribit
data.description:
TL;DR Coinbase is in advanced talks to acquire Deribit, the leading cryptocurrency derivatives platform, specializing in Bitcoin and Ethereum options. Deribit, based in the Netherlands, reached a trading volume close to $1.2 trillion in 2024, leading the cryptocurrency options market. The deal could represent one of the most significant acquisitions in the recent history of ... 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/breaking-coinbase-in-talks-to-acquire-deribit/

data.title: RWA restaking platform Zoth reports $8.4 million security breach
data.description:
Zoth, a decentralized RWA protocol has taken to X, formerly Twitter, to announce that its system experienced a security breach.  According to reports, the hacker got away with over $8 million, mostly in stablecoin which was quickly converted to DAI. The hack seems to have first been reported by a user on X who provided […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/zoth-reports-security-breach/

data.title: Insider Wallet Moves $1.87 Million MELANIA Meme Coin
data.description:
An insider wallet holding 50 million MELANIA tokens—5% of the meme coin’s total supply—recently transferred $1.87 Million worth to a new address. The move coincides with the end of month 2 in MELANIA’s vesting schedule. It is a critical moment for the volatile token tied to Melania Trump
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/03/21/insider-wallet-moves-1-87-million-melania-meme-coin/

data.title: Billionaire Warren Buffett Shifts Capital To Several Assets After Dumping Bank of America, Executing Timely US Equity Market Exit
data.description:
Billionaire Warren Buffett is now stashing his firm’s funds outside of the United States after massively unloading US equities last year. In late 2024, Buffett’s Berkshire Hathaway amassed a $334 billion cash position after the firm became net-sellers of assets including the sale of 117 million Bank of America (BAC) shares, worth about $5.5 billion.
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/21/billionaire-warren-buffett-shifts-capital-to-several-assets-after-dumping-bank-of-america-executing-timely-us-equity-market-exit/

data.title: Strategy prices $711M offering of 10% perpetual strife preferred stock to fund Bitcoin purchases
data.description:
Michael Saylor’s Strategy will settle the sale of its 8.5 million shares of 10% Series A Perpetual Strife Preferred Stock offering to fund its Bitcoin purchases.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/strategys-711m-offering-to-buy-bitcoin/

data.title: Bitcoin To Surge With or Without President Trump’s Backing, Says deVere Group CEO – Here’s His Six-Figure Target
data.description:
The CEO of the financial services firm deVere Group, Nigel Green, is predicting Bitcoin (BTC) will hit a massive six-figure target in 2025 for one key reason that doesn’t rely on US President Donald Trump’s support..
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/03/21/bitcoin-to-surge-with-or-without-president-trumps-backing-says-devere-group-ceo-heres-his-six-figure-target/

data.title: U.S. Justice Department Moves to Shield Trump from Capitol Riot Lawsuit
data.description: According to BlockBeats, the U.S. Department of Justice has taken steps to protect U.S. President Donald Trump from lawsuits related to the 2021 Capitol Hill riot. This legal action aims to shield the President from potential legal consequences stemming from the events that unfolded during the incident.

data.title: U.S. President Trump Announces Imminent Ceasefire in Russia-Ukraine Conflict
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has announced that a comprehensive ceasefire in the Russia-Ukraine conflict will be achieved soon.

data.title: Coinbase acquiring Deribit talks reaches ‘advanced’ stage: Bloomberg
data.description:
In January, Deribit obtained a financial adviser to "review opportunities" after attracting attention from possible buyers.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/347538/coinbase-acquiring-deribit-talks-reaches-advanced-stage-bloomberg?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss
